question: [Amazon] Where is my order?
answer: You can track your order in the 'Orders' section of your Amazon account.

question: [Amazon] How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Expedited options are available at checkout.

question: [Amazon] Can I change my delivery address?
answer: Yes, you can update your address before the item ships from the 'Orders' page.

question: [Amazon] Do you offer international shipping?
answer: Amazon currently serves select international locations. Check our shipping policy for details.

question: [Amazon] Why is my delivery delayed?
answer: Delays can occur due to weather or logistics. Please check the tracking link for updates.

question: [Amazon] What happens if I miss my delivery?
answer: Our delivery partners will usually attempt delivery 3 times before returning the item.

question: [Amazon] Can I pick up my order from a store?
answer: Depending on the location, Amazon offers pickup points. Check availability at checkout.

question: [Amazon] How do I contact the delivery agent?
answer: You will receive the agent's contact details via SMS when the order is out for delivery.

question: [Amazon] Is shipping free?
answer: Free shipping is available on eligible orders or for Amazon premium members.

question: [Amazon] How do I return an item?
answer: Go to 'Orders', select the item, and click 'Return/Replace'.

question: [Amazon] What is your return policy?
answer: Most items can be returned within 7-30 days of delivery, depending on the product category.

question: [Amazon] When will I get my refund?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.

question: [Amazon] Can I exchange my item for a different size?
answer: Yes, you can request an exchange for apparel and footwear if the size is available.

question: [Amazon] Do I have to pay for return shipping?
answer: Return shipping is generally free for eligible items on Amazon.

question: [Amazon] My item arrived damaged. What do I do?
answer: Please initiate a return immediately and upload photos of the damage.

question: [Amazon] Why was my return rejected?
answer: Returns may be rejected if tags are missing or the item appears used. Contact support for details.

question: [Amazon] How do I get a refund for a cancelled order?
answer: Refunds for cancelled orders are processed automatically to your original payment method.

question: [Amazon] How do I change my password?
answer: Go to settings > security and click 'change password'.

question: [Amazon] How do I close my account?
answer: Navigate to account settings, select 'Deactivate Account', and follow the prompts.

question: [Amazon] Is my credit card information secure?
answer: Yes, Amazon uses industry-standard encryption for all transactions.

question: [Amazon] How do I update my email address?
answer: Go to 'Personal Details' in your account settings.

question: [Amazon] Can I share my account with family?
answer: You can add multiple addresses, but sharing login details is discouraged for security reasons.

question: [Amazon] What do I do if my account is hacked?
answer: Reset your password immediately and contact Amazon customer support.

question: [Amazon] How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
answer: Click the 'unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any promotional email.

question: [Amazon] How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to 'Login & Security' settings to enable 2FA for your account.

question: [Amazon] Where can I find my invoice?
answer: Invoices are available under the 'Orders' or 'Billing' section of your profile.

question: [Amazon] What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Credit/Debit cards, Net Banking, UPI, and select Digital Wallets.

question: [Amazon] Why did my payment fail?
answer: This usually happens due to insufficient funds, bank server issues, or an expired card.

question: [Amazon] Can I pay cash on delivery?
answer: Yes, Cash on Delivery (COD) is available for many locations and products.

question: [Amazon] How do I use my wallet balance?
answer: You can select your Amazon wallet balance as a payment method during checkout.

question: [Amazon] Are there any hidden charges?
answer: No, the final amount shown at checkout includes all taxes and shipping fees.

question: [Amazon] My bank account was debited but the order failed.
answer: The amount will be naturally auto-refunded by your bank within 3-5 business days.

question: [Amazon] How do I apply a promo code?
answer: Enter the promo code in the 'Apply Coupon' field during checkout.

question: [Amazon] Why is my coupon not working?
answer: Coupons may have expired or may not be applicable to the items in your cart.

question: [Amazon] Do you have a loyalty program?
answer: Yes, join our premium membership for exclusive discounts and free shipping.

question: [Amazon] Are bank offers available?
answer: Bank-specific discounts are listed on the product page and applied at checkout.
